result: USART3 Rx ISR now only enqueues bytes and rearms reception
Protocol and ASCII parsing moved to PC_Link_Poll()
USART3 IRQ priority reduced from highest priority to a lower priority
Binary link transmit timeout reduced from 100ms to 8ms to limit blocking stalls
Control updates are now released by the TIM6/HAL tick callback through a pending counter
Main loop consumes control ticks instead of polling HAL_GetTick() thresholds directly
Encoder fault mask now triggers immediate brake-and-stop behavior in the control loop
Leaving idle due to a still-active encoder fault is blocked
Wheel PI controllers now use a small nonzero Ki
Startup assist is now edge-triggered and rearmed only after motion or command release
Default post-boot mode changed from open-loop to closed-loop for host control

static_checks: Confirmed TIM6 callback now feeds a control pending counter
Confirmed PC_Link_UART_RxCpltCallback no longer parses protocol bytes directly
Confirmed encoder fault mask triggers safety stop logic in RobotControl_Update

residual_risks: No hardware-in-loop validation was performed in this session
Hardware-level issues such as current sensing and physical emergency stop remain out of scope
